baseline.observed: help still documented --limit N and --count N, without the new positive-value and conflict rules

observed_weaknesses: CLI help lagged behind the parser's stricter validation rules.
Operators could not see that --output conflicts with --no-export or that preview sort selectors are mutually exclusive.

selected_candidate.name: CLI help validation documentation
selected_candidate.reason: Keep user-facing command help aligned with fail-closed parser behavior.
selected_candidate.success_metric: --help prints positive limit/count rules, output/no-export conflict, and preview sort exclusivity.

safety_controls: The change is limited to promptvault-cli.rs.
Help text was factored into a testable function.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
